_meta.description: Single source of truth for the managed Jira-driven test flow. Each managed Jira Test issue maps to one Java test class, one stable Xray Test Execution, and an optional pinned GUNS ref.
_meta.sourceTestRule: The Jira issue key itself is treated as the Xray Test issue key. Do not let Xray auto-create method-named Test issues for managed runs.

GUNSQA-51.note: Run UT-U-01 from the Test issue branch and reuse the stable unit-test execution.

GUNSQA-52.note: Run UT-U-02 from the Test issue branch and reuse the stable unit-test execution.
